action.reasoning: Observation: the switch to FullyObsWrapper failed before training because different Minigrid tasks produce different full-grid image shapes, so SubprocVecEnv cannot stack observations. Analysis: we need a shape-normalizing wrapper that pads/crops all full-grid symbolic images to a fixed size across tasks; 25x25 safely covers the listed train/eval environments. Since sparse PPO still struggles, keep the stronger full-observation idea but make it trainable first, and use a moderate run with immediate eval to verify learning signal. Decision: add a FixedGridObservationWrapper that pads full-grid images to 25x25, update the feature extractor to handle the fixed shape, finish train.py cleanly, run a 200k-step PPO training with full observations, locally test predict.py, and submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --total_timesteps 200000 --save_dir checkpoints/fullobs_200k && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/fullobs_200k --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
